The so-called grooving makes it easier to start drilling and reduces the adverse effect of the drill bit moving on the surface of the material. The traditional scoring method requires the use of a hammer. The presented automatic punches mark the material thanks to the use of a strong internal spring that moves the hardened steel needles. This eliminates the need to carry a heavy hammer. The chopper does not require spring tensioning - it is done automatically. Immediately after pressing the needle to the material and impact, we can repeat the action by marking the next point. The punch has an adjustable strike force used to optimally match the hardness of the material being marked.                     Key Features of YATO YT-47161,125 mm Adjustable Automatic PunchFast and accurate point...

Káva ve filtru Drip it Decaf je bez kofeinu, který je odstraněný přírodním procesem Swiss Water Process. Vyniká chutí s nasládlými tóny, mezi nimiž dominuje karamel, lískový oříšek a med. Skvěle chutná samotná i v kombinaci s mlékem. Káva ve filtru Drip it Decaf je tvořená 100% výběrovou Arabikou. Kávová zrna se praží v české pražírně v Kostelci nad Labem.
